title: RNA-seq figure pipeline for mitochondrial impairment in mouse cachexia
description: Analysis scripts and figure generation pipeline for the manuscript examining mitochondrial dysfunction in mouse cachexia via bulk RNA-seq (344P tumor-bearing vs sham). Produces the five figures in the paper: combined myogenesis/proteolysis GO panels, mitochondrial-highlighted volcano plot, OXPHOS hierarchical breakdown, literature-curated myogenesis TF-target network, and 3-level MitoCarta hierarchy (appendix). Uses MitoCarta 3.0, QuickGO, and TFLink v1.0 as external data sources.

creators.name: Martens, Marvin
creators.affiliation: Department of Translational Genomics (TGX), Institute of Nutrition and Translational Research in Metabolism (NUTRIM), Maastricht University, Maastricht, the Netherlands
